calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Encumber Trust Real Property
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah Fox for successor trustee Deborah J. Dolch.
Julie Matsuoka, beneficiary (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the petition for instructions to encumber trust real property.

Ms. Matsuoka stated that she objected to the petition, expressing concern that the proposed encumbrance could affect her ability to continue residing at the property and reduce trust assets. She also reported that she was seeking new counsel.

Ms. Fox responded that the proposed encumbrance was intended to provide liquidity to address the settlor's ongoing care needs and deferred fees, and stated that the encumbrance would not affect Ms. Matsuoka's right to reside at the property. She further reported that the matter was time-sensitive due to unpaid care and trust expenses.

After discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with intent to grant the petition over Ms. Matsuoka's objection.

Ms. Fox further reported that the lender was now offering a reduced interest rate and requested leave to submit a corrected proposed order reflecting the updated rate. The Court authorized submission of a revised proposed order for review.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Instructions To Encumber Trust Real Property
Off Calendar Dec-22-2025 Continued To Dec-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
